title: drosera paleacea subsp. trichocaulis
intro: Drosera paleacea subsp. trichocaulis, commonly known as the pale sundew, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Drosera paleacea subsp. trichocaulis include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote better sleep. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
